editionData.title: Daily Brief for May 11, 2026: Global Headlines, Markets, Hacker News, Product Hunt
editionData.description: A daily brief for May 11, 2026 covering global headlines, market closes, Hacker News, and Product Hunt.
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Putin’s Forces Are Barely Inching Along on the Battlefield
headlines.summary: The Russian military has yet to solve a fundamental problem: how to make big advances in eastern Ukraine when drones are everywhere.

headlines.title: Keir Starmer Says No, He Won’t Resign
headlines.summary: But if his opponents mounted a challenge, how would it unfold?

headlines.title: Trump Says Iran’s Response to Latest U.S. Proposal ‘Totally Unacceptable’
headlines.summary: The United States and Iran have been discussing a 30-day extension to their cease-fire and a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Lebanese Mourn Eight Members of One Family Killed in Israeli Strike
headlines.summary: Israel has escalated attacks on Lebanon since Thursday, further unraveling a truce in its war with Hezbollah. Among those killed on Saturday was a 6-month-old infant, relatives said.

headlines.title: Cruise Ship Linked to Hantavirus Outbreak Arrives in Spain’s Canary Islands for Disembarking
headlines.summary: Small groups of passengers and crew left the ship after it anchored off Spain’s Canary Islands on Sunday. Those aboard were expected to be flown to their home countries, officials said.

headlines.title: Trump says Iran’s reply to US peace plan ‘totally unacceptable’
Trump to discuss Iran with Xi Jinping during China visit: Officials
US Jewish leader, Israel advocate Abe Foxman dies at 86
Medics among 51 killed in Israeli attacks on Lebanon in past 24 hours
Trump says US will not allow Iran to reach enriched uranium
U.S. cruise passengers head to Nebraska for hantavirus monitoring
headlines.summary: Passengers are returning to their home countries after weeks on the ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak. The Americans aboard are headed for Nebraska to be evaluated by health officials.

headlines.title: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father
headlines.summary: The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.

headlines.title: Trump rejects Iran's latest response to U.S. ceasefire proposal
headlines.summary: Iran delivered its response to Pakistani mediators on Sunday, according to the state-run Islamic Republic News Agency.

headlines.title: A chocolate laboratory in Italy will be good for chocolate eaters — and farmers
headlines.summary: The chocolate biz is raising the bar with a lab to assess cacao beans from around the world. (Talk about a sweet gig!) Consumers and farmers stand to benefit from the "Standard of Excellence" program.

headlines.title: Keir Starmer's party lost big in U.K. local elections. Here's what comes next
headlines.summary: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected calls for his resignation.

headlines.title: Passengers and crew taken off virus-hit vessel
headlines.summary: Passengers and some crew members were taken off a virus-stricken cruise ship on Sunday, to begin long journeys back to their home countries.

headlines.title: Iran sends response to US peace proposal
headlines.summary: Iran has sent its response to a United States proposal aimed at ending the war in the region, the Islamic Republic News Agency said on Sunday. The ‌response, details of which are awaited, was sent to mediator ​Pakistan, and will ‌focus at this stage ‌on ​ending the war, IRNA said.

headlines.title: Evacuation of cruise ship begins off Canary Islands coast
headlines.summary: GRANADILLA DE ABONA, Spain- Occupants of a cruise ship struck by a deadly hantavirus outbreak that has sparked international alarm began leaving the vessel for their repatriation in Spain's Canary Islands on Sunday.

headlines.title: Laura Fernandez sworn in as Costa Rica's president
headlines.summary: SAN JOSE - Laura Fernandez was sworn in on Friday as Costa Rica's president for a four-year term during a ceremony at the National Stadium in San Jose.

headlines.title: Flying Tigers descendants vow to continue the story of China-US youth friendship
headlines.summary: Young descendants of Flying Tigers said in a recent China Daily interview that youth exchanges are vital to strengthening China-US mutual understanding and friendship. They expressed hope for continued exchanges and deeper connections between young people of both countries.

headlines.title: Uncertainty continues over Congress’ Kerala CM pick
headlines.summary: Uncertainty persists over Congress' Kerala CM selection as internal factions clash and the AICC delays its decision.

headlines.title: PM attacks Congress on alliance
headlines.summary: PM Modi criticises Congress for betraying DMK, calling it a "parasite party" and questioning its governance and alliances.

headlines.title: Manipur Naga bodies seek PM’s ‘personal’ intervention against armed Kuki groups aiding external aggression
headlines.summary: Naga civil bodies urge PM Modi's intervention against Kuki violence, citing foreign-backed assaults and a need for peace settlement.

headlines.title: Mizoram police bust racket using fake court papers to release prisoners
headlines.summary: Mizoram police arrest two for orchestrating a forgery racket to release 17 inmates from a district jail using fake court documents.

headlines.title: ED probing alleged scams worth nearly ₹4,000 crore across the education sector
headlines.summary: ED investigates ₹4,000 crore scams in education sector, involving fake admissions, scholarship frauds, and recruitment irregularities.

headlines.title: Trump rejects Iran's response to US peace proposal as 'unacceptable'
Nintendo shares slump as price hikes, games shortfall spook market
Trump and China's Xi set for talks spanning Iran, nuclear, trade and AI
Latvian defence minister resigns after Ukrainian drones hit oil tanks
Iran proposal calls for end of war and lifting of sanctions, news agency reports
